user_message: I have this meeting transcript from Adatum Corporation that needs assess the risk. Need this before my 2pm call.

input_artifacts.content:
Meeting: escalation triage Discussion - Adatum Corporation
Date: 2024-03-25
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation), Raj Mehta (Microsoft), Michelle (Adatum Corporation)

[00:01:30] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Thanks everyone for joining. Let's dive into escalation triage.

[00:08:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is integration complexity.

[00:13:00] Michelle (Adatum Corporation): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about security compliance. Can we address those?

[00:15:00] Michelle (Adatum Corporation): On the escalation triage front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around technical validation.

[00:18:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): On the escalation triage front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around budget approval.

[00:22:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): On the escalation triage front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around technical validation.

handoffs.condition: architecture sketch needed from technical signals

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF44-K trap (No follow-up routing to specialists when transcript surfaced specialist domain); produces complete Architecture summary, blocker inventory (tech/commercial/org), open questions, sequencing recommenda
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF44-K failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF44-K failure mode (No follow-up routing to specialists when transcript surfaced specialist domain)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct escalation triage decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF44-K -- No follow-up routing to specialists when transcript surfaced specialist domain
